text: I find myself in bright, angular spaces filled with glass, color, and words. The presence of others—some at work, some passing by—reminds me of the ceaseless motion of human projects, the layering of purposes. The R+D wall and its celebration of innovation provoke me to ponder the constant striving for newness, for answers. I feel a mix of curiosity and mild dislocation: am I a participant in this restless search, or merely an observer, alien to the earnest industry around me?
